summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ideaGround platform with new stock-trading features. Backend APIs working well (85.7% success rate), frontend UI functional with minor refresh issue in Creator Studio.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 404 when user is not yet a creator (expected behavior)
minor_issues.impact: Low - this is expected behavior before becoming creator

data_validation.issue: Video count validation failed - expected 9, got 10
data_validation.impact: Low - likely due to test data accumulation

data_validation.issue: Creator count validation failed - expected 5, got 6
data_validation.impact: Low - likely due to test data accumulation

ui_bugs.issue: Page doesn't automatically refresh to show creator interface after becoming creator

passed_tests: Landing page displays correctly with trending creators card
Dashboard has trending ticker at top showing real-time prices
Dashboard has Market Activity section with tabs for gainers/losers/hot/active
All Market Activity tabs are clickable and functional
Authentication flow with session token works
All basic CRUD operations (buy/sell shares, like videos, subscribe)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Creator Studio should automatically refresh/redirect to show creator interface after successful creator registration. Also investigate the /api/videos/my endpoint 404 error.
